content: Oh, do you have a guide for the stories?

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...

content: carefull you don’t accidentally spoil yourself as the recs go all the way untill present story
and if you have any more questions @ nikolazuli the author is very knowledgeable

I will try my upmost to, but seeming as I am human, in moments, I may lose myself to my emotions. When that occurs, I promptly apologize, as I will in the future, and did with this altercation. As stated, I will do what I can to remain calm, but I cannot promise to not have a “bad day” as I am human unless I am not consider such, which would be a interesting topic. 

Besides the point, I will take my own leave from this server, if I catch myself losing my temper again. I can promise you that. I am sure both sides would prefer to maintain a healthy environment for new players to grow, and if I impend the agenda, then it’s for the best I take myself away. For, the new players that shall prosper! I can agree to this.
you can use a pyramid on her and reinvest the dupes in a good ultra standard instead!

So you can fulfill Any one of the three.
IMO, the easier requirement is Lightless Realm as long as you have enough units to field it.
The level and chapter requirements are more time and comp gated

Lightless is way easier than trying to kill a certain boss without spamming Gnosis
